dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dragonfly Doji approximated as long lower wick relative to small body (lower_wick > body). Downtrend confirmed via sma_20 > sma_50 (bearish alignment). Confirmation via upward gap opening (open > prev_close). Exit on reversal back below prior day low (close < prev_low). Author silent on exit details; reasonable reversal exit applied.

backtest_rule.reason: Dragonfly Doji approximated as long lower wick relative to small body (lower_wick > body). Downtrend confirmed via sma_20 > sma_50 (bearish alignment). Confirmation via upward gap opening (open > prev_close). Exit on reversal back below prior day low (close < prev_low). Author silent on exit details; reasonable reversal exit applied.

source_rule_text: Dragonfly Doji: A bullish reversal pattern in downtrend confirmed by upward gap opening the next day
